aeo_readiness.summary: The website has a decent structure and includes essential service pages, but it lacks depth in content and customer engagement, which are critical for AEO.
quick_wins: Add detailed, unique content for each service page to improve relevance and comprehensiveness.
Incorporate customer testimonials and reviews to build trust and provide social proof.
Optimize meta tags and headers with targeted keywords to enhance search visibility.

gbp_analysis.found: The website has a Google Business Profile (GBP) but lacks reviews and engagement.
gbp_analysis.summary: While the business has a GBP, it is not actively managed, with no reviews or regular updates, which limits its effectiveness in local search.
critical_issues: Lack of engagement with customer queries or feedback.

nap_citations.summary: The business has consistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone Number) information on its website, but citations on external platforms are limited.
action_items: Verify and update NAP information on major directories like Yelp, Yellow Pages, and Bing Places.
Ensure NAP consistency across all online platforms, including social media profiles.
Actively manage and respond to listings on review sites to improve local SEO.

schema_gaps: Service schema for each specific service offered (e.g., Furnace Installation, Air Conditioning Repair).
Review schema to highlight customer testimonials and ratings.
LocalBusiness schema with detailed business hours and contact information.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of comprehensive, unique content that addresses customer pain points and frequently asked questions.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Voice search and AI-driven search queries due to the absence of conversational content and structured data.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implement FAQ sections on service pages and incorporate natural language in content to align with voice search queries.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Publish blog posts or articles that establish the business as an expert in HVAC services, covering topics like energy efficiency, maintenance tips, and industry trends.
